#document
  <!doctype html>
  element ns=html local="html" attrs=[]
    element ns=html local="head" attrs=[]
      element ns=html local="title" attrs=[]
        "FAQ"
    element ns=html local="body" attrs=[]
      "\n"
      element ns=html local="h1" attrs=[]
        "FAQ"
      "\n"
      element ns=html local="details" attrs=[]
        element ns=html local="summary" attrs=[]
          "Can I export data?"
        element ns=html local="p" attrs=[]
          "Yes, from account settings."
      "\n"
      element ns=html local="details" attrs=[]
        element ns=html local="summary" attrs=[]
          "Do you support SSO?"
        element ns=html local="p" attrs=[]
          "Available on enterprise plans."
      "\n"
